Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Entry Of Default And For Leave To File Answer And Cross-Complaint
Off Calendar Nov-15-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT WALTER WORSHAM, MOISES MONGALO's Motion For Relief From Entry Of Default And For Leave To File Answer And Cross-Complaint is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Answer and Cross-Complaint to be filed and served forthwith. Moving party shall prepare and submit a [proposed] written order.
